name: Mom's Best Baked Beans (Vegan)
recipeInstructions:
This recipe is from the cookbook Lean Luscious & Meatless. It requires some time to prepare but is well worth it. Substitute baby limas for navy beans if desired. Rinse and drain the beans. Combine them with the remaining ingredients (except tomato sauce) in a large bowl, mix well, cover, and refrigerate for 24 hours.
To cook: Transfer bean mixture to an oven-safe pot. Add tomato sauce. Bring to a boil over medium heat, then reduce temperature to low, cover, and simmer for 45 minutes, stirring occasionally. Preheat the oven to 300°F. Place the pot in the oven and bake covered for 4 hours, checking every half hour and adding water as needed until beans are tender. Serve hot.
